deploy.startCommand: rm -rf packages/sdk/dist packages/sdk/tsconfig.tsbuildinfo apps/agents/dist apps/agents/tsconfig.tsbuildinfo && pnpm --filter @suipredict/sdk build && pnpm --filter @suipredict/agents build && echo '=== sdk dist files ===' && ls -la /app/packages/sdk/dist/predict-client.js && echo '=== agents dist files ===' && ls -la /app/apps/agents/dist/index.js && grep -c 'sdk-load' /app/packages/sdk/dist/predict-client.js && grep -c 'agents-load' /app/apps/agents/dist/index.js && node apps/agents/dist/index.js

commands: echo 'build at runtime, not during image creation'
